本人: the person himself, the said person

様子: situation, aspect, circumstances; appearance, looks; sign, indication
食べる: to eat, to live on (e.g. a salary), to live off

付く: [vi] attach / adhere to ; be connected with
所為: cause, fault; because of a certain thing

不味い: bad-tasting, unpalatable; poor, clumsy; unwise, foolish

収まる: [vi] be put back in place, restored be settled, brought to a settlement
